title: SpyNPCs
description: A lightweight NPC plugin for SpyBedWars shop/upgrade npcs.
body:
# SpyNPCs
### (Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/fzcGYV7E9Q) for any issue/query/suggestion)

**SpyNPCs** is a lightweight and efficient NPC system built for minigames and lobbies. It provides a simple way to create interactive NPCs with skin support and custom actions without the overhead of larger NPC plugins.

### 👤 Quick NPC Management
Create and customize NPCs in seconds. Whether you need a Shopkeeper for BedWars or a simple Quest-giver, SpyNPCs handles the heavy lifting with minimal performance impact.

### ✨ Key Features
- **Skin Support**: Set skins instantly using any Minecraft username.
- **Custom Actions**: Assign commands or custom interactions to trigger when a player clicks an NPC.
- **Packet-Based Rendering**: Efficient NPC handling that won't lag your server.
- **Clean Storage**: NPC data is stored in easy-to-read JSON files, making manual edits simple if needed.
- **Startup Stability**: Improved loading logic to ensure NPCs appear correctly even after a server crash or restart.

### 🛡️ Compatibility
- **Loaders**: PaperMC (Recommended) & Spigot.
- **Version**: Minecraft 1.21.11.
- **Integration**: Designed to work perfectly with **SpyBedWars**.

---
*Developed by SpyGamingOG*
